name: §2.25 Pending-spec content fidelity: auditor reports unknown_vocab on a pending spec asserting on an invented YAML key
command: mkdir -p /tmp/cl423-vocab-test && printf '{"name":"x","command":"grep zzfakekey123: file","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0}}\n' > /tmp/cl423-vocab-test/x.json; out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending /tmp/cl423-vocab-test --arch "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/architecture-v1.9.md" --section "§10" 2>&1 || true); echo "$out" | grep -qE 'unknown_vocab|dirty' && echo rejects 1>&2; rm -rf /tmp/cl423-vocab-test
